title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - Yes
scenario: Reset Device restores all device settings to default values via Device Settings > Reset Device in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the app.
3. Change all available device settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Audio Settings) to non-default values.
4. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Reset Device.
6. Tap "Yes" on the confirmation popup to confirm the reset.
7. Observe the success message: "Settings Restored! Remember to unplug and power off/on your headset".
8. Tap "OK" to dismiss the success message.
9. Navigate through all device settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) and verify each setting has been restored to its default value.
expected: All device settings are restored to their default values as per UI specifications. A success message "Settings Restored! Remember to unplug and power off/on your headset" is displayed after confirmation.
